title: Code-Splitting
acceptance_summary: startup JS falls materially and deferred features remain reliable

title: Web Workers
acceptance_summary: output parity remains exact and heavy-path cost or responsiveness improves

title: Critical-Path Payload Reduction
acceptance_summary: first-load bytes and blocking assets fall without unacceptable visual regressions

title: Precomputed Artifacts
acceptance_summary: artifacts validate, fallback remains intact, and artifact-backed output matches runtime output

title: Adaptive LOD And Chunking
acceptance_summary: source selection matches rules and map behavior improves without unacceptable fidelity loss

title: Virtualization
acceptance_summary: node count falls materially while identity, ordering, focus, and sticky behavior remain acceptable

title: Caching And Versioning
acceptance_summary: repeat loads improve, versioning is explicit, and no stale or mixed-version issue is observed

title: CSS Containment
acceptance_summary: targeted layout cost falls without breaking sticky or measurement behavior

title: Interaction Batching
acceptance_summary: target interaction feels smoother or unchanged and stale updates do not appear

title: Dependency Trimming
acceptance_summary: measurable startup or size savings exist without functional regression

title: Image Pipeline
acceptance_summary: image bytes fall without unacceptable quality loss or layout shift

title: Performance Budgets
acceptance_summary: budgets catch regressions while remaining stable enough to trust

title: Combined Verification
acceptance_summary: accepted items continue to behave well together
